SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF TOSCA GIORGI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUSTIN BRISTOW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY GIORGI, TOSCA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIORGI, TOSCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRISTOW, JUSTIN L. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/15/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JUSTIN L. BRISTOW ON 12/28/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GIORGI, TOSCA AS TO DEFENDANT BRISTOW, JUSTIN L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2017 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-28-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TOSCA GIORGI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUSTIN L. BRISTOW IS PRESENT.
